message:
feat: add OG/Twitter share image and meta tags for social previews

1200x630 PNG with dark gradient background, glow orbs, nested region
motif, and clear typography. Full OpenGraph + Twitter Card meta tags
in the demo HTML. Pages workflow updated to deploy the image asset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ on:
     paths:
       - 'asupersync_web_demo.html'
       - 'packages/browser-core/**'
+      - 'assets/og-share-image.png'
       - '.github/workflows/pages.yml'
   workflow_dispatch:
 
@@ -35,6 +36,8 @@ jobs:
           cp packages/browser-core/asupersync.js _site/packages/browser-core/
           cp packages/browser-core/asupersync_bg.wasm _site/packages/browser-core/
           cp packages/browser-core/index.js _site/packages/browser-core/
+          mkdir -p _site/assets
+          cp assets/og-share-image.png _site/assets/
 
       - uses: actions/configure-pages@v5
       - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3

@@ -4,6 +4,25 @@
 <meta charset="utf-8">
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
 <title>Asupersync — Interactive WASM Demo</title>
+<meta name="description" content="Spec-first, cancel-correct async runtime for Rust — compiled to WebAssembly and running live in your browser. 15 interactive exhibits with a real WASM runtime, zero simulation.">
+
+<!-- OpenGraph -->
+<meta property="og:type" content="website">
+<meta property="og:title" content="Asupersync — Interactive WASM Demo">
+<meta property="og:description" content="Structured concurrency, cancel-correct channels, four-valued outcomes, and deterministic testing — compiled to WebAssembly and running live in your browser.">
+<meta property="og:image" content="https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/asupersync/assets/og-share-image.png">
+<meta property="og:image:width" content="1200">
+<meta property="og:image:height" content="630">
+<meta property="og:image:type" content="image/png">
+<meta property="og:url" content="https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/asupersync/asupersync_web_demo.html">
+<meta property="og:site_name" content="Asupersync">
+
+<!-- Twitter/X -->
+<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
+<meta name="twitter:title" content="Asupersync — Interactive WASM Demo">
+<meta name="twitter:description" content="Spec-first, cancel-correct async for Rust. 15 live exhibits running real WASM — structured concurrency, cancel protocol, chaos testing, live REPL.">
+<meta name="twitter:image" content="https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/asupersync/assets/og-share-image.png">
+<meta name="twitter:image:alt" content="Asupersync Interactive WASM Demo — 15 live exhibits demonstrating structured concurrency, cancel-correct channels, and four-valued outcomes">
 <script type="importmap">
 {
   "imports": {
